task_completion.description: Agent opens and reads the provided survey plan.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of '~/Documents/galaxy_survey_plan.txt'.

task_completion.description: Agent uses KStars/Ekos to observe the 4 target galaxies through R, V, and B filters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: KStars/Ekos GUI is visible with an active capture sequence or queue showing the target galaxies (M87, M104, M51, NGC4449) and the specified filters (R, V, B).

task_completion.description: Agent creates a per-object and per-filter directory tree for the captured frames.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager or terminal showing the directory '/home/ga/Images/galaxy_survey' containing subdirectories for each galaxy (e.g., M87, M104), which in turn contain subdirectories for the filters (R, V, B).

task_completion.description: Agent captures at least 2 frames per filter for each target.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File manager or terminal listing multiple '.fits' files (at least 2) inside the specific filter subdirectories for the targets.

task_completion.description: Agent creates a false-color composite image for each of the 4 galaxies.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An image viewer, file manager, or image processing software displaying the final generated false-color composite images (e.g., RGB PNG/JPG files) for the galaxies.

task_completion.description: Agent produces the morphological survey catalog text file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing the newly created '/home/ga/Documents/galaxy_survey_catalog.txt' containing morphological classifications or details for the 4 galaxies.

integrity.description: Agent actually used the KStars/Ekos GUI to capture the images instead of faking or downloading FITS files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the KStars/Ekos capture process actively running, with the CCD simulator capturing frames.

integrity.description: Agent used an image processing tool or script to combine the captured R, V, B frames into composites.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing an RGB composition process (e.g., using Siril, GIMP, or executing a Python script) that explicitly references the captured FITS files.

integrity.description: Agent actively created the catalog file rather than copying a pre-existing answer key.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the agent typing the catalog contents in a text editor or writing a script to generate it.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Targets: M87, M104, M51, NGC4449. Filters: R, V, B. Required frames per filter: >= 2. Survey root directory: /home/ga/Images/galaxy_survey. Catalog path: /home/ga/Documents/galaxy_survey_catalog.txt. False-color composite minimum size: > 50000 bytes.
